headline: Mastercard Incorporated (MA) Considering Real Payment Unit Divestment amid Stablecoin & Blockchain Infrastructure Focus
summary: Mastercard Incorporated (NYSE:MA) is one of the Motley Fool’s high-growth stock picks. On March 26, Financial Times reported that Mastercard Incorporated (NYSE:MA) is exploring selling a real payment unit it purchased in 2019. The unit offers payments between accounts in Europe and generates $370 million in annual revenue and $100 million in earnings. Mastercard acquired […]

headline: Amazon Deal And Rule Changes Put Mastercard Valuation In Fresh Focus
summary: Amazon has selected Mastercard as the network for its new U.S. business credit cards, replacing American Express. The Reserve Bank of Australia plans to ban surcharges on Mastercard payments, affecting how merchants can price card transactions. Nium has launched a stablecoin card issuance platform that uses Mastercard's network to connect digital assets to card payments. Mastercard (NYSE:MA) is drawing attention after a series of developments across retail, regulation, and fintech. The...

headline: Franklin Templeton debuts new crypto division following 250 Digital acquisition
summary: Franklin Templeton just bought 250 Digital. This marks the latest crypto acquisition made by a traditional finance firm. Crypto M&A deals are expected to be worth over $37 billion in 2026.
